ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "jumpman_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery personnel (Jumpman) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used for delivery */,
  "pickup_place" TEXT /* Pickup location for the order */,
  "place_category" TEXT /* Category of the place where the item is sourced */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item being delivered */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items being delivered */,
  "item_category_name" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., entrees, shakes) */,
  "how_long_it_took_to_order" TEXT /* Time taken from order placement to pickup */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order history */,
  "dropoff_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drop-off location */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "total_delivery_time" TEXT /* Total time taken for the delivery */,
  "delivery_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or instructions for the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_jumpman_id FOREIGN KEY ("jumpman_id") REFERENCES jumpmen ("jumpman_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_dropoff_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_location_id") REFERENCES dropoff_locations ("dropoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_item_name FOREIGN KEY ("item_name") REFERENCES items ("item_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_pickup_place FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_place") REFERENCES pickup_locations ("pickup_place")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address for deliveries */,
  "preferred_delivery_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for deliveries */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated for frequent orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jumpmen" (
  "jumpman_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery personnel */,
  "jumpman_name" TEXT /* Full name of the jumpman */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used by the jumpman */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the jumpman */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the jumpman */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating from customers */,
  "total_deliveries" INTEGER /* Total number of deliveries completed */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the jumpman logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jumpman_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pickup_locations" (
  "pickup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pickup location */,
  "pickup_place" TEXT /* Name of the pickup place */,
  "pickup_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the pickup location */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the pickup location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pickup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dropoff_locations" (
  "dropoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drop-off location */,
  "dropoff_place" TEXT /* Name of the drop-off place */,
  "dropoff_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the drop-off location */,
  "dropoff_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the drop-off location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the drop-off location */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the drop-off location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dropoff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_times" (
  "delivery_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery time record */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery ID */,
  "when_the_delivery_started" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the delivery started */,
  "when_the_Jumpman_arrived_at_pickup" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the jumpman arrived at pickup */,
  "when_the_Jumpman_left_pickup" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the jumpman left pickup */,
  "when_the_Jumpman_arrived_at_dropoff" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the jumpman arrived at dropoff */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual time for delivery */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any delays (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_times_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "item_category_name" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery associated with this order */,
  "is_duplicated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order is a duplicate */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used for the delivery */,
  "max_load_capacity" REAL /* Maximum load capacity of the vehicle */,
  "speed_limit" REAL /* Speed limit for the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery statistic record */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery ID */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken for the delivery */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time taken for pickup */,
  "dropoff_time" TEXT /* Time taken for dropoff */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled for the delivery */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Fuel consumed during the delivery (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_statistics_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)
